productDisplayName: Red Chief Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Lend a new season twist to your wardrobe with this pair of red chief shoes. Crafted from the highest quality leather (that's also recyclable!) which won't burn a hole in your pocket - this is your go-to option for comfy leather footwear. Product Details Blunt toed, black semi-formal slip on shoes Leather upper with stitched detail and reinforced overlay at the heel collar and pull loop at the back Slightly padded foot bed, around the mouth and tongue Upper adhered to the outsole Tough rubber outsole with lugs and grooves for improved grip Material and Care Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dust Use a leather conditioner and a brush for added shine
